Identify extreme pricing behavior

Katsuhiro Komatsu

10 October, 2021

What I do

  • Conduct a counterfactual in which margins have to be not greater than 0.1.
  • There are THS establishments that choose extremely large wages and fees.
  • Compare those establishments with other establishments in terms of actual prices and shares.
